items.title: Waymo will soon go fully autonomous in four more cities
items.summary: Waymo will ditch human supervisors in San Diego, Las Vegas, Tampa and Denver.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.
